query:
insert or replace into SkippedRequirements (
                last_collect_nr,
                product_id,
                id
            )
            select
                rs.last_collect_nr,
                rs.product_id,
                rs.id
            from RequirementVerificationStates rs
            where rs.last_collect_nr = $1 and rs.product_id = $2
            and rs.state == $3
